examples: I moved to this rinky-dink little place in Massachusetts.
The new computer system was an improvement over the rinky-dink way of saving information.
Khine developed a technique to make microfluidics chips directly from Shrinky Dink plastic.
Mr Calislar is sure Mr Dink's murder is part of a far broader resistance to reform.
Gates and his Windows are the logical extension of Winky Dink and his Magic Window.
